content: napari-based SAM2 GUIs (napari-sam2long, Medical-SAM2GUI, napari-vos-sam2) follow a 'prompt-first, correct-last' workflow: point-click prompts + optional propagation produce an initial mask, user manually paints/erases to fix errors, then the corrected label layer is exported (commonly as TIFF, converted to signed 16-bit label image preserving source geometry). This is a proven, reusable pattern for click-to-segment-then-manually-correct tools rather than building one from scratch.
